# DOW-UAP-D18, Mission Report, Iraq, December 2022 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

# Misrep undefined-8216304

## Narrative
~~(S/NF)~~ AT 1206Z, [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM OKAS. AT 1220Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. FROM 1323Z TO 0626Z, [1.4a] COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. FROM 1518Z TO 0426Z, [1.4a] SUPPORTED TH[1.4a] TO OP[1.4a] (OBJ [1.4a] [1.4a] IVO BAGHDAD, IRAQ. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 1620Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED POSSIBLE UAP. SEE UAP LINE 1.AT 0426Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 0655Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 0723Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OKAS. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-AR

~~(S/RELIDO)~~ Mission Narrative

# DOW-UAP-D18, Mission Report, Iraq, December 2022 - Page 5

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 8 October 2025

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

*   **Gentext:** (S//NF) [redacted] COORDINATED WITH TF 1.4a 236 MINUTES PRIOR TO TAKE OFF. PRECOORD WAS SATISFACTORY. AT 1220Z, 1.4a ARRIVED ON STATION ISO TF 1.4a FOR OP 1.4a 1.4a, 1.4c TO CONDUCT POL SCANS AND ID HVI/POI SIGNATURES. FROM 1518Z TO 0426Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED SCANS FOR HVI/POI, POL, ADMS IN SUITS, WEAPONS, CONVOYS/SENTRY, AND PERSONNEL 1.4c 1.4c FROM 1921Z TO 0428Z, 1.4a, 1.4c AT 0426Z, 1.4a WAS CLEARED OFF TASKING AND RETURNED TO BASE (RTB)

### ISR ASSET UTILIZATION
*   **Supported Unit:** TF 1.4a
*   **Supported Operation:** OP 1.4a (OBJ 1.4a, 1.4c)
*   **Precoord Time:** 236 MINUTES
*   **Precoord Effectiveness:** SATISFACTORY

### WEATHER
*   **Weather:** (U) WEATHER WAS NOT A FACTOR

### EFFECTIVENESS
*   **Tasker:**
*   **Intel Gap Filled?:** No
*   **Gentext:** -

*   **Gentext/Additional Details:** -
